summary: Frontend-only testing of Puzzle Master Blast mobile game - Coin Shop (IAP) and inventory features. All requested features verified working: Coin Shop with 4 packages, Jokerler modal with coin/ad purchase, Temalar modal with persistent inventory, Game screen with 3 block generation.

issues: useNativeDriver not supported (expected for Expo web)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features tested and working. Google Play IAP is MOCKED for web preview (works on native builds only). AdMob is also MOCKED for web.

home_screen.details: Home screen loads with: PUZZLE MASTER BLAST title, animated logo, user stats (İsim Gir, Lv.1, Rekor: 0), coin balance bar (100 coins with + button), 4 game modes (Klasik Mod, Zamanlı Mod, Çok Oyunculu, Turnuva), bottom navigation (Sıralama, Oyunlarım, Ödül, Temalar, Jokerler, Mağaza, Görevler)

daily_reward_modal.details: Auto-appears on home load, shows 7-day calendar (Pzt-Paz), today's reward (50 XP, 100 coins), 'Ödülü Al!' claim button works

coin_shop_modal.details: 4 coin packages visible: 500 (₺19.99), 1,200 (₺39.99, POPÜLER badge, +20% bonus), 3,000 (₺79.99, +50% bonus), 8,000 (₺149.99, EN İYİ DEĞER badge, +100% bonus). Shows 'Mevcut Bakiye' (100 coins), info icons (Güvenli ödeme, Anında teslimat, Coinler kaybolmaz), Google Play terms text.

coin_shop_purchase_simulation.details: Purchase button clickable, confirmation dialog appears with 'Satın Almayı Onayla' text. Web simulation works (MOCKED - real purchases on native only).

jokerler_modal.details: 4 jokers visible: Bomba (3x3 alanı temizle, 200 coin, 1x inventory), Karıştır (Yeni bloklar al, 150 coin, 1x inventory), Ekstra Süre (+30 saniye, 300 coin, 0x inventory), Satır Temizle (Bir satırı temizle, 250 coin, 0x inventory). Each has 'İzle' (watch ad) and coin purchase buttons. Coin balance displayed (100 Coin).

temalar_modal.details: Shows 'Bloklar (20)' and 'Arka Plan (12)' tabs. Block themes include: Klasik (active), Neon Mavi, Neon Pembe, Neon Yeşil, Neon Gökkuşağı, Okyanus, Gün Batımı, Orman, Sonbahar, Şeker Pembesi, Şeker Mavisi, Ateş, Buz, Galaksi Mor, Galaksi Mavi, Altın, Elmas, Aurora. NEON and GLOW badges visible. Unlock icons show ad cost (1-5 ads).

arka_plan_tab.details: 12 backgrounds: Klasik Gece (ÜCRETSİZ, active), Derin Okyanus (500), Gün Batımı (500), Gece Ormanı (500), Galaksi (750), Neon Şehir (750), Volkanik (1000), Buz Mağarası (1000), Aurora Gökyüzü (1500), Kozmik (1500), Kiraz Çiçeği (2000), Zümrüt (2000). Coin costs displayed on locked backgrounds.

game_screen.details: Game screen loads with: 'Klasik Mod' title, Pause button, Sound toggle, Trophy button, Score display (star icon, 0), Level (LV.1), High Score (trophy icon, 0), XP bar (0/100), Power-ups bar with 3 buttons (Bomb with 1x, Shuffle with 1x, Extra Time with 0x), 8x8 game board, 3 block pieces at bottom (+2, +5, +4 points), Ad Space placeholder.

block_generation_fix.details: Block generation fix verified - 3 blocks are correctly generated and displayed at bottom of game screen with point values (+2, +5, +4).

coin_balance_consistency.details: Coin balance (100) displayed consistently across home screen coin bar, Mağaza modal, Jokerler modal, Temalar modal.

inventory_persistence.details: Inventory system implemented with AsyncStorage. Purchased themes/backgrounds saved to inventoryStore and persist across sessions. Default items (classic theme, classic_night background) always available.

mocked_functionality.Google_Play_IAP: In-App Purchases are MOCKED for web preview - shows simulation with 2 second delay. Real purchases work on native Android builds only.
mocked_functionality.AdMob: Banner, interstitial, and rewarded ads are MOCKED for web preview - functional on native builds only. Web shows 'Ad Space' placeholder and simulates ad watching with 1.5s delay.
mocked_functionality.note: Production builds will have real Google Play IAP and AdMob integration.

feature_verification.best_value_badge: VERIFIED - 'EN İYİ DEĞER' badge on 8000 coin package
feature_verification.current_balance_display: VERIFIED - 'Mevcut Bakiye' shows current coin balance
feature_verification.purchase_button: VERIFIED - Purchase buttons work, confirmation dialog appears
feature_verification.joker_coin_purchase: VERIFIED - Each joker shows coin cost and purchase button
feature_verification.joker_ad_watch: VERIFIED - Each joker shows 'İzle' (watch ad) button
feature_verification.theme_inventory: VERIFIED - Purchased themes saved to inventory and persist
feature_verification.block_generation_fix: VERIFIED - 3 blocks correctly generated in game screen
